title: Matching people before they share homes.
caption: A trust-first path from the proposal deck to a focused mobile product for Riyadh shared housing.

hero.title: Find the right room and the right household before the lease.
hero.copy: The narrowed strategy is simple: verified supply, compatibility signals, request flow, and move-in readiness before we touch hospitality, hardware, or multi-city expansion.

nowCard.label: What we are building now
nowCard.title: A seeker-first mobile wedge
nowCard.copy: Onboarding, discover, room detail, match requests, inbox, and a move-in timeline. Host operations stay intentionally lighter until supply quality is proven.

laterCard.label: What we are deferring
laterCard.title: Broad inventory and smart-lock ops
laterCard.copy: Hotels, chalets, B2B dashboards, payment depth, and access-control infrastructure stay out of the first product loop.
